title: ADMINISTRATION MANAGER
description:
Scope of Work:

  • Oversee and manage the full spectrum of administrative and office operations to ensure smooth and efficient daily operations.

  • Supervise and guide the administrative and accounts team, ensuring tasks are completed accurately and on time.

  • Manage office administration matters including document control, procurement of office supplies, vendor management and coordination of deliveries.

  • Review and approve quotations, purchase orders, invoices and payments prior to management approval.

  • Oversee basic accounting functions, including Accounts Receivable (AR), Accounts Payable (AP), bank reconciliations and monthly statements of account.

  • Monitor and review the Company’s bank transactions and cash flow.

  • Coordinate and ensure timely submission of statutory requirements such as CPF contributions, IR8A, employee leave records and claims.

  • Oversee payroll processing and ensure accuracy and confidentiality.

  • Assist in month-end closing activities, including general journal entries and reconciliation schedules.

  • Develop, review and improve administrative and accounting procedures to enhance operational efficiency.

  • Provide support in HR-related matters, including staff records, onboarding and general HR administration.

  • Plan, coordinate and support company events and internal activities.

  • Handle ad-hoc administrative and operational duties as assigned by management.


Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Business Administration, Accounting or related fields.

  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant working experience in administration and/or accounts, preferably in a managerial or supervisory role.

  • Strong leadership and people management skills.

  • Good knowledge of basic accounting principles and statutory requirements in Singapore (CPF, IR8A, etc.).

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (MS Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

  • Excellent organizational, communication and problem-solving skills.

  • Meticulous, responsible and able to work independently.

  • Experience in managing administrative or accounting teams will be an advantage.


Working Hours:

  • Monday to Friday, 8:30am – 5:30pm

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in Singapore in 2015, Dynamech System specializes in Fire Protection Systems. Such systems include Fire Alarm System, Sprinkler System, Clean Agent System and Foam System in both the public and private sectors. For the past year, Dynamech System has grown progressively to its current strength.

ACMV plays a part in Fire Protection Systems as well. Such systems include Smoke Control System and Smoke Extraction System.

Therefore, there is a need for us to integrate these systems together as a solution for both the client and the owner.

With the commitment and dedication of the top management leading the team, together with the vast experience and expertise of our committed and dedicated key personnel and staff, our goal is to go beyond the needs of engineering and provide solutions for our clients.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMECH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.
